modmenu.descriptionTranslation.barkahud: Adds a configurable racing-style HUD for ice boat racing.
barkahud.config.title: BarkaHud Settings
barkahud.tooltip.extended_hud: Shows the g-force meter and input key overlay.
barkahud.tooltip.speed_bar_profile: Changes the speed bar's scale and behaviour:
barkahud.tooltip.speed_bar_profile.packe: Water & Packed Ice — best for low speeds.
barkahud.tooltip.speed_bar_profile.mixed: Mixed Ice — suitable for any ice type.
barkahud.tooltip.speed_bar_profile.blue: Blue Ice — designed for blue ice racing.
barkahud.tooltip.speed_bar_profile.progr: Progressive — automatically adjusts the scale to your speed.
barkahud.tooltip.camera_enabled: The player automatically looks in the direction the boat is drifting.
barkahud.tooltip.camera_aggressiveness: The boat speed (m/s) at which the camera fully follows the velocity direction. Lower values are more aggressive.
barkahud.tooltip.camera_smoothing: How fast the camera blends toward the target direction (%). Higher values respond more quickly.
